definitions: Every difficult or unpleasant situation has some potential for good or a positive aspect, even if it's not immediately apparent.
There is always a positive side to every negative situation.
examples: I know you're upset about losing your job, but every cloud has a silver lining; now you can pursue your dream career.
The car breaking down was inconvenient, but every cloud has a silver lining – we discovered a charming little cafe while waiting for the tow truck.
Even though the project failed, every cloud has a silver lining; we learned valuable lessons for future endeavors.
lemma: every cloud has a silver lining
source: every cloud has a silver lining
